title: Deform360: A Massive Multi-view Visuotactile Dataset for Deformable World Models
innovation_summary: Deform360: A Massive Multi-view Visuotactile Dataset for Deformable World Models: To address this, we present Deform360, a large-scale visuotactile dataset featuring 198 daily-life objects, 1,980 interaction sequences, and over 215 hours of observations from 41 surround-view.
